Thesis: Best-positioned independent AI cloud hyperscaler; NVIDIA preferred access + owned DCs + $50B committed backlog; 684% YoY growth; watch for MoS entry at $122–130. Updated Jul 2, 2026: Bloomberg reported Jul 1 that Meta is building a competing capacity-resale business ('Meta Compute'), hitting NBIS -12.3% to $240.13 same day. Fundamentals unchanged since Q1 2026; risk and technicals refreshed. Discipline unchanged — watch, don't chase.
